mechanism_explained: Spence signaling theory applied to AI-disrupted labor market
Architecture choices become brand surfaces — legible boundaries create namable product surfaces; the Madison five-layer structure was both engineering and brand work
concept_specified: agent = role-in-pipeline (not autonomous), Madison = 5 layers + orchestration

mechanism_explained: Archetype as forced specification — a constraint that makes brand decisions decidable; without it brands drift and customers lose recognition handles
concept_specified: brand archetype = strategic anchor (Mark/Pearson 12), distinguished from Jungian psych and personality typology

mechanism_explained: Scope as creative constraint — every yes to a feature is a no to shipping the core; PRD discipline produces compounding advantage and brand surface
concept_specified: PRD = one-page contract: problem, gap, tool, MVP boundary; MVP = smallest thing that produces validated learning

mechanism_explained: Pipeline fragility as a brand problem — every external dependency is a contract you don't control; when contracts change, downstream tools fail and brand damage flows downhill
concept_specified: data pipeline = chain of contracts (n8n makes the contracts visible)

mechanism_explained: Autonomy vs orchestration trade-off — autonomy buys flexibility at the cost of predictability, and the choice IS a brand decision (transparent collaboration vs delivered competence)
concept_specified: multi-agent system = specialized roles + coordination mechanism + handoff protocol; CrewAI role/goal/backstory pattern as canonical

mechanism_explained: Interface compounds at session frequency, features at use frequency — interface misalignment damages brand faster than feature failure (Bard $100B in two days)
concept_specified: interface = UI + interaction model + deployment + brand surface

mechanism_explained: Negative space is the brand — personal brand consistency comes from what you decline; archetype is the rule that decides
Negative space is the brand — startup brand coherence at scale comes from what the company declines to build/sell/say
concept_specified: startup brand strategy = mission/vision/values/UVP/archetype/voice/positioning + named no-list + name testing

mechanism_explained: Visual elements perceived in archetypal context — match between visual decisions and archetype produces brand coherence; mismatch produces dissonance the user feels but cannot articulate
concept_specified: visual identity = system (logo + palette + typography + imagery + layout) downstream of brand strategy; creative brief = strategy-to-design translation

mechanism_explained: Story shape carries archetypal commitments — Hero's Journey, Quest, Methodology, Service, Rebellion each fit specific archetypes; mismatch produces narrative dissonance the audience reads as false
concept_specified: brand storytelling = origin + customer + transformation; customer-as-hero + brand-as-guide; archetype constrains shape

mechanism_explained: Portfolio compounds across uses — total brand impressions = time invested × times referenced; well-designed portfolios get cloned, shared, and templated, generating returns for years
concept_specified: portfolio = designed product (audience + structure + narrative + craft); not resume + screenshots

mechanism_explained: Integrated pitch density — 10 minutes of pitching builds an impression that would otherwise need months of LinkedIn scrolling; coherence (every slide answering the same question) beats polish
concept_specified: professional presence = resume(×2) + portfolio + LinkedIn + pitch deck + live delivery + followup; Kawasaki 10/20/30
